Class SkillController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.skill.SkillController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1") public class SkillController extends Object

  • Method Details

    • getAllSkills

      @GetMapping("/skills") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Skill>> getAllSkills()

    • createSkill

      @PostMapping("/skills") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Skill> createSkill(@RequestBody Skill skill, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • getSkillById

      @GetMapping("/skills/{skillId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Skill> getSkillById(@PathVariable Long skillId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • updateSkill

      @PutMapping("/skills/{skillId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Skill> updateSkill(@PathVariable Long skillId, @RequestBody Skill skill, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • getAllCategories

      @GetMapping("/skills/categories") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<SkillCategory>> getAllCategories()

    • createCategory

      @PostMapping("/skills/categories") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SkillCategory> createCategory(@RequestBody SkillCategory category)

    • getCategoryById

      @GetMapping("/skills/categories/{categoryId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SkillCategory> getCategoryById(@PathVariable Long categoryId)

    • updateCategory

      @PutMapping("/skills/categories/{categoryId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SkillCategory> updateCategory(@PathVariable Long categoryId, @RequestBody SkillCategory category)

    • deleteSkill

      @DeleteMapping("/skills/{skillId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteSkill(@PathVariable Long skillId, org.springframework.security.core.Authentication auth)

    • deleteCategory

      @DeleteMapping("/skills/categories/{categoryId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteCategory(@PathVariable Long categoryId)
